## Input Image Handling Rules
For any input image marked as a strict input asset, include it visibly and preserve its content. Do not redraw, replace, relabel, or invent a similar figure. Scale and crop only as needed for composition while keeping the important labels, arrows, data, and relationships recognizable.

## Universal Constraints
- The final image itself must contain the title and key points.
- Render Chinese text exactly and legibly; avoid garbled characters.
- Keep the confirmed deck style consistent while varying layout by slide role.
- No watermark, unrelated logo, or extra slide number.
